MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556

Easy to Use C++ Capture Interface

This module encapsulates the C interfaces provided in the library into c++ classes, located in SDKv3\Examples\VC++\all_example\common\mw_capture. Make the interface simple and easy to use, and developers can quickly develop their own programs.

The call process is as follows:

#include "mw_capture/mw_capture.h"
void main(){
CMWCapture::init();
CMWCapture::RefreshDevices();
channel_count = CMWCapture.GetChannelCount();
p_capture = CMWCapture::mw_capture_factory(index);//index <channel_count
p_capture->start_capture(true, true);//if capture audio and video
//set av params
p_capture->set_resolution(1920, 1080);
.....
p_capture->set_audio_channels(2);
while(1){
st_frame_t p_video_frame = p_capture->m_p_video_buffer->get_frame_to_render();;
st_frame_t p_audio_frame = p_capture->m_p_audio_buffer->get_frame_to_render();
}
delete p_capture;
CMWCapture::exit();
}
